Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Government_Resource.asp

# SBDC Government Jumpstation by Stage

## Resource type
Government-contracting stage-routing resource.

## Resource summary
Use to separate pre-venture, new startup, existing business, advising/resources, certification programs, and SBA contracting guide links. Especially useful because many entrepreneurs want contracts before validation or operational readiness.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
